transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Are you going to the environmental lecture this evening?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. The speaker is going to talk about renewable energy, and I've always been interested in that topic.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the man attending the lecture?

questions.prompt: Why is the man attending the lecture?

choices.text: To register for an environmental science course.

questions.explanation: He says he is interested in renewable energy and wants to hear the lecture.
questions.evidence: The speaker is going to talk about renewable energy.
